# Chess Piece Assets

The SVG chess piece sets in this directory are copied from the Lichess `lila`
repository:

https://github.com/lichess-org/lila/tree/master/public/piece

License information is listed in Lichess `COPYING.md`:

https://github.com/lichess-org/lila/blob/master/COPYING.md

Included sets:

- `chessnut`: Alexis Luengas, Apache 2.0
- `spatial`: Maurizio Monge, MIT
- `cburnett`: Colin M.L. Burnett, GPLv2+
- `merida`: Armando Hernandez Marroquin, GPLv2+
- `rhosgfx`: RhosGFX, CC0 1.0
